businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $398.50 (+0.88%). 'Macrohard' unveiled — Tesla-xAI joint project where 'Digital Optimus' can allegedly emulate entire companies' functions. FTC approved Tesla's $2B xAI investment swap for sub-1% SpaceX stake. European registrations rebounded +10% YoY but Motley Fool says 'far from a strong rebound.' GTC 2026 (3/16-19) opens Monday — Jensen Huang keynote to spotlight autonomous driving and agentic AI. Market cap $1.49T, P/E ~366x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuation in Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
FSD/Software: License revenue ~$3B. Accelerating subscription conversion

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Historically overvalued. Extremely expensive relative to current earnings.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Still premium valuation even factoring FY2026 estimates.

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Overvalued vs. revenue. Reflects AI/robotics story premium.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue decline. Third consecutive year of delivery drop concerns.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin crushed from 17% in FY2022 to 4.6% by price cuts.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Positive cash flow maintained. Solid against $8.5B capex.

keyMetrics.name: Debt/Equity
keyMetrics.interpretation: Healthy balance sheet. Net cash position of $29.3B.

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Return on equity sharply declined. Profitability recovery is key.

growthDrivers.title: Macrohard Unveiled — Tesla-xAI Joint 'Digital Optimus' Targets SaaS Market
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Musk revealed 'Macrohard' — combining xAI LLMs with Tesla AI agents. Claims it can 'emulate the function of entire companies.' Uses Tesla AI4 chip, directly challenging SaaS market. Reigniting 'SaaSpocalypse' fears.

growthDrivers.title: FTC Approves xAI↔SpaceX Equity Swap — IPO Optionality Secured
growthDrivers.description: Meyka (3/13): Tesla's $2B xAI investment converted to sub-1% SpaceX stake. FTC approved. Exposure to SpaceX's $350B+ private valuation, future IPO optionality.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 Opens Monday — Autonomous Driving & Agentic AI Spotlight
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA GTC (3/16-19) with Jensen Huang keynote. Vera Rubin + Blackwell Ultra B300 expected. Indirect catalyst for Tesla FSD/robotaxi ecosystem.

growthDrivers.title: China February EV Sales +91% YoY — Strong Local Momentum
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): China-made EV sales growing for 4 consecutive months. +91% impressive despite low base. Relative strength vs. BYD slowdown.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: US EV market 50%+ share leader. Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B-mile vertical integration is core moat. However, overtaken globally by BYD.

moats.description: FSD 8.2B miles of driving data + AI4 proprietary chip. Macrohard joint venture with xAI expanding software moat.
5 Gigafactories. Gigacasting + 4680 battery cell internalization for cost advantage.
Megapack/Powerwall/Supercharger network. Energy revenue +27% YoY, driving Tesla's overall growth.
Global EV icon, but Musk's DOGE-related political activities eroding brand value.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales leader. Dominates Tesla on price competitiveness.

competitors.name: Rivian
competitors.detail: US pickup/SUV EV. VW investment stabilizing finances.

competitors.name: NIO
competitors.detail: Chinese premium EV. Battery swap model.

recentNews.headline: Tesla unveils 'Macrohard' — joint xAI project 'Digital Optimus' challenges SaaS market
recentNews.significance: Tesla AI4 chip + xAI LLM fusion. Claims to 'emulate entire company functions.' SaaSpocalypse fears reignited. Accelerates AI company pivot.

recentNews.headline: FTC approves Tesla's xAI→SpaceX equity swap
recentNews.significance: Tesla's $2B xAI investment converted to sub-1% SpaceX stake. SpaceX IPO optionality secured.

recentNews.headline: Musk admits xAI 'not built right' — rebuilding underway
recentNews.significance: Weeks after Tesla invested $2B, Musk admits xAI needs foundation-up rebuild. Governance concerns intensify.

recentNews.headline: European EV registrations +10% YoY — first rebound after 13-month decline streak
recentNews.significance: Positive but Motley Fool says 'far from a strong or secure rebound.' Model Y -24% but overall +10%.

recentNews.headline: Forbes: 'Tesla's best growth story isn't robotaxis — it's batteries'
recentNews.significance: Megapack/energy business emerging as Tesla's real growth engine. +27% growth while EV deliveries decline.

analystOpinions.notableComment: BofA resumes Buy + $460 target. Robotaxi launch in 7 new markets expected. Motley Fool: 'Below $400 is more interesting entry point, but FSD/robotaxi delay risks persist.'

risks.title: Third consecutive year of delivery decline risk
risks.description: FY2025 deliveries 1.63M (-8.5% YoY). Second straight year of decline. No FY2026 delivery guidance adds uncertainty.

risks.title: Operating margin collapse — down to 4.6%
risks.description: Crashed from 17% in FY2022 to 4.6% in FY2025. Price war + $20B capex burden may push FCF to -$5.19B.

risks.title: P/E 366x — extreme valuation risk
risks.description: Extraordinarily overvalued relative to current earnings. Major correction possible if AI/robotics story doesn't materialize.

risks.title: Musk DOGE/political risk + xAI governance
risks.description: DOGE activities damaging brand. xAI 'rebuild' admission raises questions about Tesla's $2B investment justification.

risks.title: BYD global #1 — intensifying competition in China/Europe
risks.description: BYD reclaimed global EV sales crown. Price competition intensifying in Europe and Southeast Asia.

buyReasons.title: Macrohard + SpaceX stake — AI platform transition accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: Tesla-xAI joint Macrohard enters AI software market. SpaceX equity swap provides exposure to $350B+ private asset.

buyReasons.title: Energy business +27% YoY — hidden growth engine
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack/Powerwall revenue $12.8B. Energy business maintaining high growth despite EV slowdown.

buyReasons.title: FSD European approval imminent (3/20) — regulatory milestone
buyReasons.rationale: FSD Netherlands approval expected 3/20. EU-wide expansion could drive subscription revenue surge.

buyReasons.title: RSI 28 — technically oversold territory
buyReasons.rationale: RSI below 30 signals oversold. Short-term technical bounce possible near $400 psychological support.

overallOpinion: Tesla stands at a pivotal transition from EV company to AI platform.
Macrohard (Tesla+xAI) and SpaceX equity swap strengthen the AI narrative, but Musk's xAI 'rebuild' admission exposes execution risk.
Three consecutive years of delivery decline, 4.6% operating margin, and P/E 366x raise serious questions about current valuation.
Energy business (+27%) and FSD European approval (3/20) provide near-term catalysts. GTC 2026 Monday opening should reignite AI theme.
RSI 28 oversold but death cross (50-day MA below 200-day MA) confirmed — cautious approach needed until trend reversal is confirmed.

investmentVerdict.summary: AI pivot narrative is compelling, but deteriorating fundamentals (revenue↓, margin↓) and extreme valuation (P/E 366x) create conflict. Oversold bounce possible but trend confirmation needed.

sources.name: ainvest
sources.description: TSLA technical analysis — RSI 28, death cross
